# Thread: Coming Full Circle- Chris' Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coming-full-circle-chris-journal.19355/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Chris James — 2017-04-17T16:44:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coming-full-circle-chris-journal.19355/post-212444>

Hey everyone! First off, let me tell you a little about myself. I live in the scenic hills and forests of Southern Indiana with my wife and 4 boys. We moved out of Indianapolis about 5 years ago to get away from the hustle and bustle of city life. This is my journey!

I wrote a SUPER long first entry but deleted most of it because it was becoming to much like an autobiography.

I was a fairly healthy kid growing up until I was about 14. At that time I started smoking and then experimenting with drugs. I spent the first few years of my adulthood inside a windowless office surrounded by computers, servers and routers that I'm sure were giving off way to much EMF. I realized within a few years that I wanted a change. I became an ironworker because of the adrenaline rush I felt from being hundreds of feet in the air and the sun on my face. The 15 years I spent in that trade really took a toll on my health. I was breathing in all of those toxic fumes from welding, smoking, drinking and didn't take care of myself AT ALL.

That all changed a few years ago when I was in a bad car wreck. It really was a blessing. Because of some tears in my spleen and a small fracture in the elbow I was off of work for a few months and spent that time reading and diving in to health and "biohacking" on the internet and reconnecting with my family.

I ended up leaving my job and now work from home as a blogger.

Even though I am much healthier now, I am still concerned about all those years of damaging my body and want to raise my children to be as healthy as possible.

My mother just had some cancerous cells removed from her breast in January and is starting to show early signs of dementia. My father also had cancer when I was younger.

I will hopefully be getting my labs done next month so I can see where I am at and come up with a plan to correct any issues that I don't know about.

I eat a pretty clean diet and try to get plenty of sun every day.

I have learned so much already from you guys on this forum and all the information Dr. Kruse has published. Excited to have the ability to learn all I can.

### Chris James — 2017-04-27T00:12:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coming-full-circle-chris-journal.19355/post-212983>

I have been "becoming the sphinx" every morning at sunrise but have a question. I live in the middle of the forest so am not able to see the sun until a few hours after sunrise. Sometimes I do go to a park close by and welcome the sun that way but it is not possible all the time.

I was wondering if I would get the same benefit a few hours after sunrise since by that time I start to be able to see the sun through the trees.

### Inger — 2017-04-27T10:20:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coming-full-circle-chris-journal.19355/post-213004>

Welcome Chris!

You will still get the light tho, even if the sun is behind the trees.. Sun would be even better but you do what you can  Maybe you can build a tree hut and climb into it and watch the sunrise from there?

I just was outside an hour sitting naked like a sphinx sucking in the morning sun rays..the birds was singing for me... pure magic.... I thought I was in heaven

welcome Chris .....maybe build a tree house for you and your boys? and your wife too!

# Thread: Introduction and my health question
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/introduction-and-my-health-question.19356/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Katrina — 2017-04-18T00:18:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/introduction-and-my-health-question.19356/post-212463>

Hello....

I am a single woman, 52 years old. I reside in So California. I work as a fitness professional teaching land and water aerobics. I work primarily with Seniors. I have largely been healthy in my life, although I struggle with weight loss and gain rollercoaster. I have an addiction to sweets which comes from emotionally issues.

My mother had ruebella (German Measles) when she carried me. I am pretty normal except I have hearing loss which was recognized when I was about 5 years old. Over the years it has progressively gotten worse but I function as a hearing person. I have also been diagnosed and treated as such for glaucoma. This has been ongoing for the last 15 years.

My question is this...I have been told that both the hearing loss and the glaucoma are neurologically related...I have lost vision, about 80% in one eye and a small amount in the other....is this something that can be corrected by stopping the pressure and healing - as I understand that the body can heal itself- the damaged tissue/nerves? I have been told that the only way that anything that can be done to, possibly as it's not guaranteed, to stop the pressure is to have laser ( most likely) surgery done on them. I am looking for alternatives as I don't really want to undergo surgery and I would like to be able to communicate in one fashion or another. Since I have had the hearing loss for so long I am accustomed to it and have learned to live with it. They eyesight loss, however, has been in the past six years and it is a real challenge as I am on my own, no spouse to help and children are almost grown and are moving out to start their own lives.

So any advice, suggestions are welcome. I have found your work intriguing, I have read your book and it had made me question things. Thank you for your time.

### JanSz — 2017-04-18T03:04:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/introduction-and-my-health-question.19356/post-212471>

> [Katrina said:](/goto/post?id=212463)
>
> My question is this...I have been told that both the hearing loss and the **glaucoma** are neurologically related...I have lost vision, about 80% in one eye and a small amount in the other....**is this something that can be corrected by stopping the pressure** and healing - as I understand that the body can heal itself- the damaged tissue/nerves? I have been told that the only way that anything that can be done to, possibly as it's not guaranteed, **to stop the pressure is to have laser** ( most likely) **surgery** done on them. I am looking for alternatives as I don't really want to undergo surgery and I would like to be able to communicate in one fashion or another

I had Laser Iridotomy for Narrow Angle glaucoma.
Easy surgery.
Works fine.
If you have Narrow Angle, Laser Iridotomy may be your quick and easy way out.
After surgery I was driving home myself.
Make sure to have dark glasses with you. (If you forget dark glasses, ask for spares)

[http://www.glaucoma.org/treatment/laser-iridotomy-and-narrow-angles.php](http://www.glaucoma.org/treatment/laser-iridotomy-and-narrow-angles.php)

This video provides a brief introduction to laser iridotomy for treating narrow-angle glaucoma.
[http://www.glaucoma.org/treatment/video-laser-iridotomy.php](http://www.glaucoma.org/treatment/video-laser-iridotomy.php)

### caroline — 2017-04-18T09:27:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/introduction-and-my-health-question.19356/post-212480>

Hi Katrina and welome....

Please start a journal in the optimal journal section and give Dr. K. some health history and also your Mom's and Gran's.

Where exactly do you live? You work inside or outside?

Have you looked at the easy start guides on the home page? The leptin reset? C/T protocol?

what do you eat? drink?

How is your sleep?

Do you get outside to view the sunrise? Do you get out in Mother nature as much as possible?

Are you near the ocean?

Do you listen to his podcasts? They are a great resource for fast and easier information.

Dr. K. is all about the three legged stool ......light, water and magnetism.

This is a light storey.....

### Jack Kruse — 2017-04-18T18:57:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/introduction-and-my-health-question.19356/post-212504>

If the pressures in your eyes are quite high and your vision is bad you need to consider the surgery when you speak to the doctors. Trying to do this without laser surgery with 80% loss of vision is a big risk. Talk it over with your docs and with other patients who have had this.

# Thread: Are all Blue Blockers created equal?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 43
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### JohnnyAZ — 2017-04-18T18:54:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212503>

I have purchased two pairs of blue blockers but to be honest I am not sure I bought the right kind. First of the brand is Cyxus and I have one pair with yellow tinted lenses for home and computer use while I bought a second pair of non tinted lenses for occasions like being in the office and under flourescent lights but not looking at a computer. Basically with that said I have three questions:

1\. Are all blue blockers created equal?
2\. The clear frame ones claim to also block out UV but according to what I have learned around here UV is purple and purple is good. Since I will only wear these indoors is it ok that it blocks both blue and purple?
3\. Is there a better brand I should look to?

### Jack Kruse — 2017-04-18T19:05:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212506>

No they are not. You need to ask optical shop for a lense that blocks 400- 500 for night time use. The cheap UVEX on amazon do a good job but are not stylish.

### JohnnyAZ — 2017-04-18T19:10:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212508>

Thank you!

I am assuming having your regular prescribed glasses include this aspect is not a good idea as we do want natural blue light during the day.

### drezy — 2017-04-18T20:07:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212509>

> [JohnnyAZ said:](/goto/post?id=212508)
>
> Thank you!
>
> I am assuming having your regular prescribed glasses include this aspect is not a good idea as we do want natural blue light during the day.

It may depend on your day. If your day has you stuck behind big monitors then you probably want to use the blueblockers then. If you are outside often then maybe not so much.

FWIW I sometimes use blue blockers in the evening if I had a bit of a crazy day in order to boost my internally generated melatonin. Otherwise, I just use them in the presence of artificial light. You might want to keep notes and try out a few different use models since your own feedback could be immediate enough.

One warning I'd issue is that if you are operating a vehicle or heavy equipment go ahead and take the blue blockers off.

### JohnnyAZ — 2017-04-18T20:55:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212512>

I spend most my day in my car driving from one office to the next. In each office I sit submerged in artificial light and we are usually going over information on the computer. For these instances I would like to have something as inconspicuous as possible. For my car I wear no blockers as I am not looking at artificial light. I do have to work on my phone a lot as well so I purchased a blue light filter off a link on Jack's site to assist with that.

Does blocking blue light make you tired? I was starting to wonder that. Also I coach my daughters softball and quite often we are under the bright lights...I would assume I should wear something during this time as well.

### Andrea — 2017-04-18T21:25:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212513>

> [JohnnyAZ said:](/goto/post?id=212512)
>
> Also I coach my daughters softball and quite often we are under the bright lights...I would assume I should wear something during this time as well.

As should your daughter. And the other kids. Or train in daylight...

### JohnnyAZ — 2017-04-18T21:28:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212514>

> [Andrea said:](/goto/post?id=212513)
>
> As should your daughter. And the other kids. Or train in daylight...

Thank you! I am new here and very new to all this info so I am trying to get it all straight. Appreciate the assistance from everyone.

### drezy — 2017-04-18T21:30:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212515>

One tweak: In your car you kinda are looking at artificially filtered light in your car: see ( [https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...ht-interact-with-your-body.16519/#post-172480](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/how-does-visible-light-interact-with-your-body.16519/#post-172480) ) . Not to pick knits, just want you to develop a strong thought framework on this to best structure your routines. Are you able to roll the windows down and get some direct sun?

@[Joe Gavin](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/15415/) apparently got blutech lenses in February. Maybe he can comment on his satisfaction with them. I do not have them.

Frankly, I'm tempted to just tell you to make up some story about continuing eye surgery requiring uvex. For the sake of all that is holy people nowadays have iPod colored diabetes monitors that they display. Uvex shouldn't be that hard a social sell, but it's all in context I guess.

Ok this paper sounds a little alarming, but again I use this effect in my favor in measured doses when needed:
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/16842544](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/16842544)

I think in general, answers here will be useful to you. I think your continual questioning of you environment will be even more helpful since no of us share that with you.

### JohnnyAZ — 2017-04-18T21:43:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212518>

This is great info and I appreciate it! I will really dive into it this evening. I did glance at it and I am intrigued. This is all so new and so much to digest!

In my meet and greet I explain my health issue. Long story short it's regular and intense brain fog that started 18 months ago. There are ups and downs throughout my day but I am getting a hold of them. One is that I regularly feel sick in my car. Another is that for years I have needed to have my window open in my car and I gues intuitively my desire was taking me down the right path. I will make sure to open it as much as reasonable.

I think if I get inconspicuous blockers I can treat them as almost reading glasses. My role is a consultative one and you are right people should just accept this but to many it's outside their experience. Health comes first though so I will do what I have to.

I am interested to hear the review on those glasses though!

### Joe Gavin — 2017-04-18T22:20:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212523>

I've had BlueTech lense for about 18 months and use them during the day when indoors at work (lots of computer work and flourescent lights) and home. I also use f.flux on my computer. I also have a red-lit home so I protect my eyes that way as well at night.

I used Uvex at night, and also have CarbonShades, and also picked up a $30 pair of BPI500 tinted glasses from [www.readingglassesetc.com](http://www.readingglassesetc.com) (they all work well at night). The benefit of getting BPI500 tinted glasses from readingglassessetc.com is you can choose your frame, and can also get a prescription, and a bit more fashionable, and pretty inexpensive.

I can trained myself to drive with blue-light blocking glasses at night and have found that very helpful as well. Does take some getting used to.

So my experience is this: Night vision has improved dramatically, and I can also read without glasses as long as I have good light; reading outside in sun is no problem.

Also note that I had lasik 18 years ago (pre-Kruse). Eyes do lose some sharpness over time, and you do get farsighted. However, protecting my eyes seems to have reversed that trend.

Hope this was helpful.

### JohnnyAZ — 2017-04-18T22:27:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212524>

This is great! I am going to order some of these ASAP.

I am also really intrigued by the idea of a "red lit home." I am listening to a podcast now where Jack is saying live in the sun, sleep in the dark, and heal in the red...I have yet to find out how to properly do this. What bulbs do you use in your home?

### Joe Gavin — 2017-04-18T22:40:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212526>

> [JohnnyAZ said:](/goto/post?id=212524)
>
> This is great! I am going to order some of these ASAP.
>
> I am also really intrigued by the idea of a "red lit home." I am listening to a podcast now where Jack is saying live in the sun, sleep in the dark, and heal in the red...I have yet to find out how to properly do this. What bulbs do you use in your home?

just look for some bulbs at home depot or lowes or amazon or party stores to start. get incandescent bulbs if you can. try not to overthink it. i use red bulbs and black light bulbs in my home. have some amber as well. anything is better than blue/white lights at night. and really, should be sleeping at night in the dark, but we do what we can to mitigate. depends on your state of health and goals and what you need to reverse.

the whole goal is to protect your melatonin production at night so your body can regenerate after falling apart during the day. then get up with sun, get your barefeet on the ground and eyes in the morning sun. its a cycle that you'll come to crave.

### Joe Gavin — 2017-04-19T15:08:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212574>

> [JohnnyAZ said:](/goto/post?id=212529)
>
> So are you saying that a bulb with red glass gives red light? Is it that simple? But incandescent work better?

It's all about the frequency of light being delivered. drezy's chart above is a good one. the delivery method (incandescent > LED > CFL)of the frequency can vary. Since you are looking to use specific frequencies, incandescent are a "safer" choice if you can find them (little to no of the off-gassing you may get with CFLs). LEDs are safer. it's all about the frequency of light you are looking for.

Well that's interesting.

I guess this all forces me to ask a question, perhaps ahead of schedule, but I need to know this. Since my mitochondria is flawed...is it possible to fix? Am I able to fix it or do I need to learn to optimize it? Once flawed is mitochondria always flawed?

### JanSz — 2017-04-20T16:36:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/are-all-blue-blockers-created-equal.19357/post-212643>

> [JohnnyAZ said:](/goto/post?id=212622)

> Well that's interesting.
>
> I guess this all forces me to ask a question, perhaps ahead of schedule, but I need to know this. Since my mitochondria is flawed...is it possible to fix? Am I able to fix it or do I need to learn to optimize it? Once flawed is mitochondria always flawed?

About blue-blockers.
I do not use them during the day.
Sunlight have plenty of blue, why should I block blue during day time.

You are driving a lot. UV light stops at the windshield.

Most important time of not having blue light around is 2 may be 4 hours before bed time, to allow melatonin buildup.

tend to my Circadian rhythm

Anyone messing around with vibrational platforms or similar devices? Dave A. says all the shaking creates more ez water, along with other numerous benefits. I thought I remembered Pollock commenting about vibration in an interview.

So, True story. My wife and I were at a "Fair" type event, it was acutally some sort of home and garden expo or something if I remember right quite a few years back. We happened to be pretty flush with cash at that time, and were just ripe for the stupid impulse buy. Some dude was selling these vibration platform thingys with handles on them. Long story short, we made it home a thousand bucks lighter, but the regretful new owners of a cobweb collector. I think we got on the thing like ten times....sad.

Anyway, I drug the thing out of the gargage and to my surprise, it still works great. Been riding it for a few days, like 10 minutes is all. It acutally is quite stimulating, upon more careful observation. Thinking about grounding the platform and like sticking out in the backyard in the Sun.

Naked Grounded Vibration! I call it NGB! What could go wrong?

So, is anyone else using anything like this?

# Thread: Hi from Fremantle, Australia, and EMF question
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hi-from-fremantle-australia-and-emf-question.19359/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Peela — 2017-04-19T12:20:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hi-from-fremantle-australia-and-emf-question.19359/post-212568>

Loving the sun and the ocean here in Fremantle, Perth, Australia. Have been reading and listening for a few weeks now, just getting my head around this stuff. I am a Naturopath...the old Naturopaths from 100 years ago used the sun for healing, as well as cold water and fresh air. These things have been forgotten and replaced by gazillions of supplements in bottles, in the Naturopathy world. I love getting back in touch withe foundations of health.

Question: My Cornet ED88 just arrived and I am struggling to find where to get the info I am looking for on the readings. Basically the worst place in the whole house is sitting at my desktop computer which is a metre from the wifi router. I know I need to turn the wifi off and i am working on that. Meanwhile, the reading averages about 2 to 3 mW/m2 and frequently spikes up to 4 and 5 and even 7. The machine puts this at orange alert and sometimes red alert. How bad is this? The rest of the house, even with wifi, is .01 to .o3 mW/m2 on average, with a few hot spots a bit higher, but nothing like at my computer (except right on the phone or ipad). This is all RF of course. I am new to this and don't yet have a good feeling for it all. How bad is it? How good is it?

thanks, and I have been hanging around this forum for a while, I have only just joined up.

### Inger — 2017-04-19T20:35:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hi-from-fremantle-australia-and-emf-question.19359/post-212598>

Welcome!

Well I have another RF meter, not Cornet, mine shows around 0,02 milliwatt/m2, little less little more max 0,04 tho, around the house. I think it is ok, as that is what it shows outside too and even in the forest nearby... or I live in a totally screwed environment . Quite some windmills here, that is not so good. But I think it is tolerable readings.
The reading at your computer are not good at all . You need to use corded internet and not Wifi. It is horrible.... It is very easy to just shut off the wifi signal and use the corded version instead. The cords are very cheap too

### Dan2 — 2020-05-29T01:09:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/teslar-scalar-field-energy.19360/post-289904>

No, I haven't used them. If I were to buy one though, the SomaVedic brand is one of the most open about providing testing and data that I've seen. Which reminds me...

There's also something similar called the Spooky2. It's been updated gradually for several years. I think it started as a Rife machine with contact handles, since then has been made into a Rife machine with a plasma tube using the same gas as the original design (and a frequency generator capable of the same frequencies as specified by Royal Rife which not many modern Rife machines with a plasma tube have been able to do), can be used with a low level cold laser unit (aka LLLT), can be used for biofeedback scans (like a diagnostic method, which I don't know much more about but is a big area of discussion related to how to use these things), can be used with something called the Remote unit where you put a fingernail or blood or something with DNA in it into a holder connected to the generator and then the frequency treatment can be applied to the person even at thousands of miles away (I know that sounds fake but it's been tested with lots of people and animals and there are testimonials of the person controlling the generator applying frequencies or not without the person or animal miles away knowing and they'll hear back that the symptoms changed in pattern with the use of the frequency generator and Remote unit), and in the last couple years the Spooky2 team has made a Scalar field generator that can be used for pure scalar, added user set frequency in the scalar field, and molecular scalar which means for example you put a substance on a spot on the machine and the "information" of that substance is transmitted into the scalar field resulting in the body in the field having that "information" available in the amount that's useful as determined by the body so no under- or overdosage (I think; I could be wrong about the dosage part)(this also means you can use an expensive supplement or essential oil as the molecular addition to the scalar field and save money by providing the body with the "information" of it (if you're in that field between the two transmitting and receiving pieces of the Scalar field generator) without having to use up the expensive substance). I know it sounds crazy but there's lots of people who have been experimenting with it and the team that makes the products is active on their discussion forum and Facebook groups; it's a teamwork situation between the people at the company and the users all still figuring out together how exactly this stuff works and what the uses can be. It's much more open about sincerely trying to figure out together how to use it than any of the other "scalar" EMF related products I've seen, with the SomaVedic being 2nd best I've seen. The Remote unit affecting people and animals thousands of miles away by putting a fingernail with their DNA in the unit is really weird, and the Scalar unit being able to transmit the molecular "information" of a substance into the scalar field is weird, and I think they're both pretty interesting.

Spooky2 pre-Scalar Rife machine introduction
[https://www.spooky2-mall.com/introduction/](https://www.spooky2-mall.com/introduction/)

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

[https://www.spooky2scalar.com/scalar/](https://www.spooky2scalar.com/scalar/)
New to Scalar? Start Here!

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

[https://www.spooky2scalar.com/product/spooky2-scalar/](https://www.spooky2scalar.com/product/spooky2-scalar/)

Pure Scalar
This is the easiest way of applying healing scalar energy because nothing special needs to be done. Tune Spooky2 Scalar, then sit or lie between the transmitter and receiver. Pure scalar energy then flows between the lids.

Molecular Scalar
Placing a substance on the input coil can further enhance the Scalar signal. The molecules within the sample will change the signal between the lids. You get the curative effect of the chemical. The substance can be essential oils or drugs. For instance, you can place peppermint oil on the input coil, and you will receive the benefits that peppermint oil provides.

Rife Scalar
The third way to improve the Scalar waves is through the use of Rife Modulation. It combines the discoveries of Royal Rife with Nikola Tesla. Royal Rife found that pathogens respond to a particular frequency. Spooky2 Scalar can apply this frequency using healing scalar waves. Only Spooky2 Scalar can modulate the original frequencies of Royal Rife, turning Spooky2 Scalar into the world’s most advanced Rife machine.

After Spooky2 Scalar is tuned, connect a Spooky2 generator to the Generator connection. Sit between the transmitter and receiver while the programs are running. Spooky2 Scalar accepts any frequency from the massive Spooky2 database.

The two modulation methods can be used simultaneously to further improve the effectiveness of treatments. For example, to treat cancer, you can place frankincense, peppermint, lavender, evening primrose and citrus essential oils on the input coil, and run cancer-killing programs on the connected Spooky2 generator.

People with cancer may wish to place a chemotherapy drug to a glass container holding their urine or blood, and place the container on the input coil.

Specification：

Spooky2 Scalar is designed to be portable, compact and powerful. The transmitter has a built-in frequency generator, which supplies regular EMF (electromagnetic fields) to the receiver through the link cable. The receiver converts this to scalar energy, which returns back to the transmitter via the lids.

Transmitter Size: 170mm (H) x 360 (W) x 290 (D)
Receiver Size: 170mm (H) x 360 (W) x 290 (D)
Weight: 11 kg
Link Cable: 13 feet (4 m)
Power Adapter: 12 VDC 2A
Input Current maximum: 0.6A
Frequency Range: 1.00 MHz – 8.00 MHz
Frequency Step Size: 50 kHz
Scalar flow: 30mA

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

[https://www.spooky2scalar.com/faq/](https://www.spooky2scalar.com/faq/)

Q: What is the working theory of Spooky2 Scalar? How does Scalar Energy heal our body?

A: Spooky2 Scalar is actually using old technology, but this knowledge is not taught in schools. We are only taught magnetic and electric field theory.

Scalar waves are another type of energy transfer. It behaves very differently from electric and magnetic fields. If the frequency of the scalar wave is made to resonate with a receiver, more energy is received than sent. The further the transmitter is from the receiver, the stronger the signal.

Spooky2 Scalar has both a sender and receiver. The sender is tuned to the receiver so they are perfectly linked. There is only a single wire between the two. The return path is the aether (or air). Pure scalar waves return back to the sender. The person being treated sits between the sender and receiver, and they also become a tuned receiver.

Spooky2 Scalar can be used this way, but there are more options. If a substance is placed on the receiver, molecular modulation alters the returning scalar field. The modulated information invokes biological changes. It is as if you have the substance inside your body.

Scientific studies have proven that information alone can cause destruction to pathogens. Poisoned cancer cells on the receiver coil will induce death of cancer cells inside your body. The information of dying cells is being passed to your internal cancer cells, and they also die.

Health products or drugs can also be placed on the receiver coil. Your body then has the effects of the compound.

\_\_\_\_\_

Q: What are the advantages of Spooky2 Scalar compared with other Scalar machines?

A: We don’t compare our Spooky2 Scalar to any specific machines, so I will reply in general.
In our opinion, most so-called scalar devices work on the placebo effect. However, the fields produced by Spooky2 Scalar are strong and measurable. We use analog circuitry so the signal is pure, and the signal can be either molecular or frequency modulated.

Molecular modulation is when a substance is placed on the receiver coil. The molecules in the substance interact with the returning scalar field.

Frequency Modulation is when a generator such as the XM generator or GeneratorX is connected to Spooky2 Scalar. This type of modulation can be as high at 5 MHz. No other scalar machine can modulate anywhere near that fast. It means that Spooky2 Scalar can be used as a Rife machine, transmitting the original frequencies discovered by Royal Rife.

\_\_\_\_\_

Q: Does Spooky2 Scalar help with EMF?

A: There are a lot of devices being sold which purport to reducing or eliminating EMF. Some products even claim to make the EMF less harmful. We make no such claims. Consider this: if placing a sticker on a cell phone blocks EMF, the phone would cease to work. It requires these signals to function.

EMF radiates in all directions from many sources. A plug-in device cannot absorb these airborne signals effectively. At best it can become itself a receiver. It cannot block signals which do not pass through it.

What Spooky2 Scalar will do is improve the overall health of your body, so it can better handle the effects of undesirable EMF.

### Dan2 — 2020-08-22T01:05:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/teslar-scalar-field-energy.19360/post-291672>

I haven't used the Blushield, SomaVedic, or Spooky2 Scalar. I think the Spooky2 is most interesting because of there being lots of ways it can be played with and the company team and user community being helpful online about learning together ways to use it other than just having it make a scalar field, and about specifics of how to use the plain scalar field effect most safely and effectively in different environments. But it is expensive.

The SomaVedic I think is more trustworthy than the BluShield because of the studies testing it the company shows. For all I know (maybe someone took one apart and posted in a Facebook group or something about it) the internal workings of the SomaVedic are still a mystery to the public other than the designer saying it uses (if I'm remembering this right) combinations of gemstones (and maybe other things I'm forgetting) in sizes and spacial arrangements according to Vedic ideas with some kind of electrical circuit too. Maybe the gemstones thing isn't much of the effect and an electrical circuit producing a field makes most of the effect. That's just me being cynical about the marketing though, I don't know. I don't know if it makes a scalar field of an intensity similar to the Spooky2 that could be measured. I think for it to make a scalar field there would need to be a transmitter and receiver that can be separated to make the scalar field between them, so since the SomaVedic is one piece..? There are pendants and things like Biogeometry shapes that are sometimes described as making a scalar field even though it's one piece (I don't know if the Biogeometry company has said scalar but it's generally used by subtle energy pendant or whatever single object stuff-selling companies), so maybe scalar fields can be made surrounding one piece instead of between a transmitter and receiver or maybe those one piece things don't make scalar fields. Maybe there are different kinds of scalar fields, some that do some that don't need a separated transmitter and receiver. Or maybe, since the scalar field the Spooky2 makes is (I'm not sure how wrong I am about this) like a sphere in the middle tapering to points at the transmitter and receiver and the middle can be wider than the transmitting and receiving unit widths if there's enough distance between them, then a pendant could have a tiny transmitter and receiver of some kind (without needing outlet electricity? using some kind of ambient energy?) that makes a little field with enough volume that when it's worn close to the body it interacts with some body energy? I don't know, anyway, I do know that the Spooky2 scalar field increases in volume and strength the farther apart the transmitting and receiving units are. I don't know if the person will benefit from the scalar field most when they're in the center of that distance, or if the energy of the field is the same anywhere between the units if the body part is in the field. If the SomaVedic does use a scalar field, I don't know how it would produce it around the unit.

Maybe the BluShield is better than the SomaVedic, I don't know, but when I looked at the BluShield's website a while back the information was vague and seemed like they're just using alluring metaphors for marketing and testimonials in place of specifications or tests, so until someone takes one apart I don't know what it is or what it does. My preference about which one to buy, if I could afford any of the three, would depend on how open about the design, recommended ways to use it, testing and experimental uses the people in the business are. I think the Spooky2 team is most open (and have the help of lots of users doing some weird experiments and discussing them online) but the SomaVedic designer seems to also be trying to be as open to explaining it as he can without letting another company know proprietary information.

### Rubicon — 2017-04-23T02:23:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/phlebotomy-induced-reduction-of-body-iron.19365/post-212756>

I try to donate blood on a 'regular' basis with the goal of lowering my iron levels. I'm averaging one donation every ~9-months since 2014. Over that time my ferritin, iron, and hemoglobin levels have varied considerably, often measured on the high end of the reference range.

A couple of times after donating I've been noticeably physically tired for a few days after. Once, about 3-days after a blood draw I went for a 20-min walk and got completely weak/pale. I was breathing heavily as I slowly made my way back home. It really surprised me and gave my wife quite a scare. I'm not completely sure if that incident was related to blood donation, but I couldn't identify any other reason for it happening. It was a one-time occurrence.

Other times I've donated blood and felt a noticeable uptick in energy, clear headed, etc. I plan to continue the mitohack.

I stopped HGH for a couple months, my iron value dropped and I was able to donate blood. Then I would donate every 6-9 months and never again had an issue with a high iron level. I never had a issue of feeling weak after a blood donation. Realize I was living in front of a couple of computer monitors for 10+ hours a day and working-out inside a gym 4-5 times a week...

### Mystic Rose60 — 2017-05-01T15:37:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/phlebotomy-induced-reduction-of-body-iron.19365/post-213150>

"So if you read Time #21 and you wondering how ferritin works as a semiconductor you are in luck. Iron is an essential trace element that is used to form molecules in the body, such as hemoglobin. Ferritin is the major storage protein for iron. Free iron is toxic for cells because of its reactivity. So what controls its release? Its charge within the ferritin protein controls its release. Since iron is very reactive to sunlight becuase of its large amount of D shell electrons. Iron has a higher rate of emissivity than other atoms in cells and atoms with this ability readiate more energy than expected. When their emissivity is in the IR range of light, the proteins containing iron seem to be more energized. Emission of light energy reflects the intensity of charge movement in a protein. Ferritin is a solar active protein. Sunlight wavelengths can change when light travels through the atomic material in a cell or in blood. This change in incident light frequency is called a Stokes shift. The reason for this is when sunlight energized blood plasma solar radiation drives the charge movement which generates new electromagnetic waves that can also generate other electromagnetic waves that change the charges in their local environment. So when ferritin rises it is usually because people are not spending enough time in the sun. The body up-regulates ferritin production in this case awaiting its activation. Many people think that ferritin elevation is a sign of inflamamtion but it is actually a sign that these people live a solar spectral deficient life. If you lack sunlight, you have less electrons and more protons in tissues and this lowers the pH and this decreases the exclusion zone (EZ) in water. Ferritin is the protein within the body that stores iron and releases it through channels in a controlled fashion. The unique structure of ferritin forms a spherical shell in which the iron is "stored" as Fe(III) in a crystalline mineral. Ferritin consists of 24 peptide subunits that form two types of channels where these subunits intersect; the 3-fold channel is polar and the 4-fold channel is nonpolar. The residues that line the channels determine the polarity of the channel. Polarity refers to significant differences in charges due to the electronegativity between adjacent atoms in a molecule. The polarity of the channel link to the size of the EZ in blood plasma. The iron in the ferritin core is stored as Fe(III) in a crystalline solid. This crystal acts as a semiconductor inside of ferritin. The smallest repeating unit of the ferritin lattice is called the unit cell. The unit cell for iron is ferrihydrite. In the mineral ferrihydrite, every Fe(III) ion is coordinated to six O(II) ions. Oxygen is very electronegative compared to Fe(III). However, in ferritin, the mineral core has approximately 10% of the Fe(III) ions coordinated to five O(II) ions and 1 phosphate group. Phosphate is very active photosynthetically with sunlight. Most of the phosphate groups that are coordinated to the iron ions lie on the outside of the crystalline structure in ferritin, and are used to bind the mineral to the residues on the inside of the ferritin protein shell. When the Fe(III) in the crystalline mineral is reduced (added electrons from phosphorus or the charge separation of water by sunlight) to Fe(II) state, the iron becomes solvated in blood plasma and ferritin releases the solvated iron to tissues, in this form Fe(H2O)62+, through ferritin's 3-fold polar channel. In order for iron to be released from ferritin, the mineral lattice must be dissolved (i.e., to allow the iron atoms to break away from the lattice structure deep inside ferritin). This removal is accomplished by reducing iron from the Fe(III) (ferric) oxidation state to the Fe(II) (ferrous) oxidation state. In the Fe(II) state, iron breaks away from the lattice as the Fe2+ ion. The POSITIVE CHARGE of the Fe2+ ion attracts the electronegative oxygen atoms (ELECTRONEGATIVE) in water, and so a water "cage" forms around the ion. That cage is a Farady cage which shelters the iron from other electromagnetic waves. Hence, ferritin can control the amount of available iron in the body electrostatically, preventing iron disorders like anemia and iron overload. If someone's environment ruins the electrostatic mechanism expalined above for any reason it will effect iron status and ferritin levels in the blood. This mechanism is linked to presence or absence of charge in blood plasma or in phosphorus as a dopant. The EZ potential energy holds the key to what your iron status ultimately will be. Anemia is becoming epidemic in women and children these days for a deep reason: humans have created a low quantum yield world and this alters the charge of blood plasma which directly impacts the release of iron from ferritin. "

"The three-dimensional structure of ferritin is crucial to understand its quantum function within the body. In fact, the three-dimensional stucture of any molecule is critical in determining a molecule's properties and function optically. Hence, to better understand ferritin's role in the body, we must familiarize our self to different types of molecular representations to study ferritin's three-dimensional stucture. # Thread: SlamSlask Journal - Reversing 3 Years in IT
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 53
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### SlamSlask — 2017-04-20T20:09:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-212658>

****About me****
Hey my name is Mads
I'm a 21-year-old male from Denmark, and I live in a harbor city called Esbjerg (Easy access to seafood), moved here about 3 years ago.
I work as an IT Administrator Trainee for one of the major companies on the harbor. So a typical office job with lots of bad lightning and EMF exposure (You don't even dream of the EMF exposure in our server rooms LOL)

**Introduction**
After reading/listening to JK intensely for the last 2 weeks and implementing some of his advice I now decided to take this to the next level and make it a much bigger part of my life

The result I have gotten from his advice so far have been much better than from any of the many diets I now have gone trough. Which brings me to the first part of my introduction....

**Diet**
Guess I been trough most of the diet schemes at this point!
Before moving away from my family to my own place here in Esbjerg I ate a SAD with a lot of Coca-cola (was my go to drink even before water) lots of wheat, pasta you get the idea
After I moved to Esbjerg, about 3 years ago, I decided to do something about it and started on a journey to fix my health.
I started weight lifting 2-3 times a week and went on a typically very high carb/protein diet this was mostly oatmeal, ground beef, chicken, milk and peanut butter
As I quickly hit a plateau in my overall health I started doing a more Paleo version of the same diet (Still high carb protein etc. but better foods overall)
Finally about 8 months ago I started going full out Ketogenic/Paleo, Mostly following the advice I got from Tristian (Primal Edge Health). Here I also started to understand that macronutrients are not everything
Here I discovered why vegetables and micronutrients are important and that I had to eat more of them.
This has been the only thing that has really taken my health to another level before discovering JK

**Leptin reset/Exercise**
For about 8 weeks I have now followed the Leptin reset and the results have been amazing.
This is also the reason why I have decided to implement as much of the other protocols and advice as I can.
Before the Leptin Reset I was doing a standard Hypertrophy program (4 - 5 times a week for about 1 hour each session) I did this for 2 months and gained nearly 2 kgs of muscle mass (still a newbie) but while doing the Leptin Reset I cut down my exercise to mostly long walks.
At this point I have more energy all throughout the day (which I never really had) hunger has also gone down quiet alot
I do still feel a huge lack of energy most days but has gotten better

**Diagnoses**
I have been diagnosed with Epilepsy about 8 years ago after having 3 "attacks" in 3 months.
After this, the doctors put me on medication the one I was prescribed is called Orfiril (300 mg) 1 pill at breakfast and dinner (Only thing I know about these is that they tapped me for most of my energy)
But I haven't taken these since I moved to my own place (3 years)

The other stuff I have done since digging into this new rabbit hole have all been in the last week so they will come in my future updates.
These are the major things I can think of if any more context is needed then feel free to ask away and big thanks to JK for all the information he gives out for free!
Looking forward to meeting all you "mithochondriacs"

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**My current situation (Last update 08-10-2017)**

**Current Symptoms:**
Bloated belly (Inflammation)
Headaches (usually when at work and shortly after)
Tinnitus when around nnEMF (especially Wi-Fi)
Low vitamin D3 33ng/ml (was tested 6 months ago)
Hard time building muscle
Blue'ish lines under my eyes
Lack of energy most days (This seems to getting better slowly)
Lack of focus / lossing train of thought
Acne (mostly in my face)

**Health Wins:**
Sugar cravings are finally completly gone (happend after a few months doing the leptin RX)
Higher level of energy overall (still long from optimal)
More energy when working out
Less hunger (Only eating 2 meals most days now)

Today I looked at some pictures of myself from before I started on the Ketogenic diet
Much has changed but especially my skin has gotten much healthier. Used to have to lots of pimples and dry skin
Still not all good but much much better.

It has been very cloudy today and a bit rainy so could not catch much sunlight so went for a long walk around the city instead
Here I went by the harbor and meet one of the local fishermen who I bought a whole trout from (finally something other than salmon)
So for dinner, I made some homemade Sushi with cauliflower rice and avocado on side
Desert was some Maca/Cacao brownie
_Both recipes can be found in the [cookbook](http://www.primaledgehealth.com/product/primal-edge-health-ketogenic-cookbook/) from Primal Edge Health:

### SlamSlask — 2017-08-16T16:08:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-221770>

The basics of all this information is starting to make sense and im constantly connecting new dots
Think i got kinda addicted to researching all this
Have been changing alot of my routines and prioties according to the my new understanding of health
Everytime i connect a "dot" a new question arises which is wonderful !
I finally feel that i have a clear path to walk instead of jumping from dogma to dogma (changing diet and exercise routines)
_I have typed my questions in Italic casing_

**Job:**
Pretty quickly when i discovered JK i figured that my job was my biggest issue and after alot of thought i have decided to quit my traniee position
Gonna finish as a lower tier of my education instead and that will done by the end of the year
The money is simply not worth it to me anymore - and with the coming 5G technolgy etc. then the office is only gonna get worse

**Leptin RX:**
Been doing the Leptin RX for about 5 months now and my hunger has gone down tremendsly
I rarely eat lunch anymore except on thursdays since they serve fish at work which is free
In the last weeks i started implemeting the guidelines for after the RX ([https://www.jackkruse.com/so-you-completed-the-leptin-rx-what-is-next-2/](https://www.jackkruse.com/so-you-completed-the-leptin-rx-what-is-next-2/))
More on this in a upcoming update

**Exercise:**
Been fitting in my workouts between 3 and 5 PM (Thank god for my semi flexible work hours)
ATM im lifting 4 times a week for about 1 hour
Have set up a HIT routine which i do 2 times a week in the nearby park (best area close to my aparment according to a Cornet)
A few pepole have come up and asked me what is was doing and was pretty curios why i wear no shoes will running etc.

**Light:**
Other than the leptin RX this has been the area i focused on the most since my job has a terrible light enviroment and my understanding is that this is the most critical to get right
Been using alot of time researching how light sets the carcadian rythm especially the material that Jack talks about in his Vermont talk (Was really informative thanks @[Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/))
So had a pretty good understanding before i went and talked with a optican (Toke alot of time actually finding one who had some understanding of this)
But with alot of persistence i ended up finding one yesterday who understand the effects of light on carcaidian rythms
As soon as i told him about my project of making my own blue blockers i could see his eyes light up and he passionately started to listen to my plan
He was really interested in helping me get the tinting "chemicals" (Last thing that keeps me from making some)
So im currently waiting to see if he can get them

I talked with the owner of the Gym i go to and told him the basics about blue light and carcaidian rythm
A couple of weeks later he came back to me when i was doing my workout and asked me what he could do to improve the light in his Gym
So i helped him order some red light bulbs on Amazon to replace the ones in the ceiling
He also started turning of the (Currently) Blue lights in the daytime as the sun coming trough the windows is more than eoungh

**Sunlight:**
Morning:
Started acting like the Sphinx every morning.
I wake up at around 6:30 and first thing I do is taking out my breakfeast to my garden and eat it while sitting on the grass looking in the direction of the sun
My landlord let me cut of a few branches on a big tree to allow the morning sun to hit the grass area
Evening:
on workday days im home at around 17:00 and after making my dinnner I go outside and read the books recommended by Jack (Just finished The fourth phase of water)
These 2 things really helped me build my solar callus, before discovering JK i was nearly shining when i was in the sun lol
Now i can stay there all day even here in the summer with a UV index beetween 5 and 7
_
**nnEMF:**
Have done alot of things too decrease the amount of EMF
1\. turned of most the wireless stuff on my smartphone - only running on the 2G network in order to recive calls etc. (airplane mode at night)
2\. Got 100 Meters of Ethernet cable which i have pulled around the celling in my apartment (No WiFi) - best i can do without moving because of my neighbours
3\. I unplug everything while it's not in use
4\. Turning off power at night
5\. Replaced my wireless keyboard and mouse at work with a wired set
These are the major things
Still need to do someting about my smart-meter - The power company won't replace it even though i pay for the 3 months upfront - what can i do in this case?
_
Still don't own a Cornet as it is to expensive but the local university let me borrow one for a weekend _which helped me track down alot of things
Own a cheap meter from Amazon which measures only the nnEMF coming of the power grid
_
**In general i fell better and i have less trouble falling asleep at night (most days it takes about 10 mins) this was hugh issue for me not too long ago (shitty light all through the day)**
Becoming a member will be first thing i do as soon as i know how much money i got when starting on a new job
With this information at hand health is only a choice

### SlamSlask — 2017-10-08T15:11:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-225292>

SaSo a few things happend since my last update
Currently im trying to get some information about my mother and grandmothers health which will be added soon

**Moving:**
I am able to move this coming weekend as someone wanted my apartment from the 1.nov
So will be out of the city very soon
**Job:**
Finished my final exam and tests last week some im now back to normal working hours
But on the bright side they now have to pay me alot more
My contract is running untill the end of year
I have been offered a "study-job" at an IT company for beetween 15 - 20 hours a week after my current contract runs out
All my hours will be in the daytime
Smaller office fewer pepole but still bad overall
Still not sure if i wanna take a job as it really fells like 2 steps forward one backwards

**CT:**
Other than my cold showers i have used the decreasing tempature to do some CT while gathering the bit of sunlight there is currently
Most days it is between 10 - 15 degress C so not the coldest but good for adapting a bit
Had an 1 hours session yesterday at 13 C only wearing shorts and was impressed with the amount of energy i got for some time afterwards

**Labs:**
My doctor is not much for helping me get some blood work done currently
But will try and tell im more about my symtomps and hopefully this will change his mind
Else i will try and find another doctor

**Water:**
Still drining tap water but have bought some glass bottels which i fill up and put into the ground
Stated this after i heard Jack talk about placing ones water on a magnetico hopefully this will have somewhat of the same effect

### SlamSlask — 2017-10-22T19:58:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-226395>

Okay so time for a update...
The last 2 weeks have mostly been work, moving and alot of thinking/planning for the time to come
After selling out of my electorning devices i can now count them on 1 hands
Been working overtime the last week (about 50 hours per week) as we have been migrating some major systems
This also gave me a very good time to think about my work enviroment which is litterally a" blue lid microwave reactor"

**Work enviroment:**We are about 50 members of the IT department all of us are on the 5th floor
I switch between the support and operations department which are both located in the same corner
In these 2 teams we are 16 pepole in total
Everyone has atleast 1 smartphone - Some also a tablet (Both of these i guess are connected to the WiFI)
After we hired a few more we had to set up and extra "Router" so now there is one over each team
Everyone has 2 to 4 screens and a laptop
The building exterior is all glass (Guess this reflects back all the signals)
The light are all 6200K LEDs

Since i started this job about 3 years ago 2 of my colleges have gotten diabetes (now 4 out of 16)
Many are overweight or complain about health issues - Insane why i have'nt connected any of these dots earlier !!!
Conclusion: Can't wait to get out by the end of year - My dopamine has to be really low !
**Over time:**
With the over time i had been working from 7 in the morning til around 18 most days
The first 2 days i hesitated to wear my blue blockers at work as just changing my screen whit Flux has caused an extreme amount of comments
After 2 days of poor sleep and a very hard time falling asleep i finally decided to do the right thing and wear them all day
This helped me fall asleep much eaiser but the sleep was still terrible (Not making melatonion from the lack of sunlight i guess)
**Moving out of the city:**
So finally the weekend of my move came by !
I now live in a rented room in my colleges home which is about 15 km from the city center
This is way out in the countryside so the 2 nearest neighbours are 0,5 and 1,2 km away
This has been one of the best decisions so far

nnEMF is much lower here got only 2 cell towers in a radius of 5km here i got 3/5 bars on 3,5G
This is down from 5/5 4G whit a hell lot of towers in the city
Still got no meter so have to rely on the network speed for now
City = 50 - 80 Mbit - Here = 8 - 20 Mbits (Both Outside)
Sometime calls will fall out when inside

First biohack here:
Yesterday i used 3 hours pulling cables around this new house to eliminate the 2 wifi networks here
My laptop could see about 25 WiFi networks in my old apartment this is down to ZERO after my latest biohack
Currently making a list with future biohacks/projects that has to be done out here

**Sleep:**
My sleep has improved dramaticly since i moved (execpt the week i was doing overtime)
I feel full of energy after seeing the sunrise now - even though its hard to catch to much of it when having to meet at 8 here in the winter time
Can't wait to see if this gets even better now that the WiFi has been turned off also (the signal was not that good in my room)

**Labs / Doctor:**
After talking asking around in my network i managed to find another doctor
My first visit was very brief but after explaning my sympthoms to him he quickly arranged another visit for my so hopefully some labs are coming up soon

**Diet:**I have got back to eating 3 meals most days now
Still do BABs which help me limit my food intake for the rest of day
_Been reading the newest blogs where @[Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) talks about ketosis and the "programming" of Hydrogen i food and the link to sunlight
So now im pretty confused as to if i should add more carbs than the about 50g of daily carbs i currently eat when taking my blue led enviroment into consideration ?

**CT:**_
Still using cold showers and the outside air only as i haven't been able to read much more of the CT blogs (still on CT3)
I have started begin able to stay outside only wearing my shorts much longer so slowly getting more cold adapted_
As per my understanding so far one needs to have some atleast decent levels of Thyroid hormones before starting to do more deep CT?_

There is also a lake pretty close to my new place so hopefully that can be used for CT down the road

**Exercise:**
Been slacking alot of my HIIT traning lately
But finally picked it up again this this weekend
Haven't been lifting weight for a while now as i just don't feel like it atm.
Think this is okay as i have to get my health better before trying to build muscle again

After all everything is slowly getting better

### SlamSlask — 2017-10-30T19:33:41+0200

**Blue Blockers:**
Got my new pair of blue blockers from @[Matty\_M](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/11546/) yesterday
Been using them at work today and my headaches was decreased drastically - They have also decreased the amount of questions i get from other customers when i get my groceries
Really hope this will keep my headaches at a minimal for the rest of the year untill i get out of my current job

**Oysters:**
My "seafood pusher" got me 30 oysters on friday so been eating them all weekend and finished the last of them this morning

### SlamSlask — 2017-11-15T19:40:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-228078>

I keep learning more and more - at this point most of my thinking goes into biohacking
My projects list is getting longer everyday lol

**Electronics:**
Starting to get to a point where i don't care about all the stuff i had before - Hopefully this is my Dopamine levels rising from the ashes
At this point i can count my electronics on one hand and will get rid of my laptop and smartphone soon to (Need this for work so can't get rid of them before my work contract runs out)
Sold most of before i moved so at this point im left with a flatscreen i need to sell
Feels so good to not be in need of all these things

Even sold my huge HiFi setup which i have bought over the last 3 years - This hurt my heart a little bit but i know its for the better in the end

**Sunlight / CT:**
Have to go to work at 8 in the morning so can manage to get about 20-30 mins of the first part of the sunrise
Started getting really fast at eating my lunch so that i can go out in parking lot and get abit of sunlight into my eyes - This seems to help me sleep better even when its only about 15 min
This is one of the biggest problems for me atm
On the weekends i can be naked outside for some untill it gets to cold (atm it is between 3 - 10C) - usally about 20 mins at a time which i try to do as much as i can
This also seems to help me cold-adapt slowly as i can stay outside in the cold longer and longer

Still a little hesitant to jump into the lake that is pretty close to me - think it need to set up simple tube where i can control the water temp and cold-adapt further first

**Music:**
Allways listened to alot of music (Mostly Electronic, Drum & Bass and older rock like Led Zeppelin, Metallica etc.)
Most of my favorite albums have started to sound so different - The music does not sounds as fractal anymore and i hear it more as a whole
Thought this was pretty interesting as most the songs i have been listing to so many times over many years

**Visiting @[Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) / Diet:**
Toke a trip to Germany to visit Inger and what a lovely lady she is
We discussed some biohacks and gathered our own Oysters - So a third of my fridge is now filled with Oysters
Was really nice to meet another Mithocondriac and i learned alot too

Also started eating fish everyday to try and mitigate my bad enviroment just a bit

**nnEMF:**
After alot of calls my power company i finally managed to make a deal that allows me to get rid of the smartmeter in my new living arrangment
Will have to pay for the meter and electrian to change it and maybe a minor yearly fee
This i can live with and should help alot with decrease the nnEMF

Still have not gotten any meters but will order some soon now that i have a good amount of cash from selling most of my electronic

**Labs:**
As mentioned i got a new doctor and will go for my second consulation next week
Last time he sounded pretty interested in my "project" but time will tell

**Sleep:**
Some nights i have started dreaming alot sometimes soo much that i wake up in middle of night and wonder if it was real lol
The night when i got back from Germany i woke up 2 times as i had these very wired dreams which i can still remeber most of
Has to be all the sun seafood etc. that i got on my trip
Can't remeber the last time i could remeber my dreams !

**Quantlet:**
Bought a used Quantlet which i can't wait to try out
Hope this will help me on the more cloudy days

Overall i keep feeling a little better everyday

Fell like my Journal needs some pictures as it's getting a little boring
Soo here is a picture of my dinner with some german Oysters and mackrel shashimi

### SlamSlask — 2017-11-16T11:39:09+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-228151>

**A little update on this dream/sleep thing:**
Same thing happened this night I can still remember both of the dreams I had in detail even the scenery I remember
Again I woke up at about 2 o'clock as I had to pee and fell asleep pretty quickly
This is starting to worry me a bit as I never had these very "real" dreams before but hopefully, it is just my redox/health that is improving

**Water:**
Thinking that all the peeing has to come from my change in the water I drink
About 70% of the water I drink now is San-Pellegrino so I hope this is just my body begin on "overdrive" trying to deplete Deterium
In general, i have also started to pee a lot - between 3 & 5 times a day which I have never done before

**Mood / Cognitive:**
My mood has increased so much after my trip to Germany and it seems to stick for the time begin
my default has changed to begin and happy most of the time and small things which used to annoy on the daily basis does not have much of an impact anymore and just laugh a bit now
My thinking is so clear and fast atm

**Facial Skin / Blue Blockers:**
This just keeps improving so fast - Got some small improvements with this when I changed my diet to low-carb before starting Jack's protocols but nothing to compared to the improvements over the last 2 weeks
This seems to be correlated to me starting to use my blueblockers at work

### Inger — 2017-11-16T13:15:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-228158>

> [SlamSlask said:](/goto/post?id=228078)
>
> I keep learning more and more - at this point most of my thinking goes into biohacking
> My projects list is getting longer everyday lol
>
> **Electronics:**
> Starting to get to a point where i don't care about all the stuff i had before - Hopefully this is my Dopamine levels rising from the ashes
> At this point i can count my electronics on one hand and will get rid of my laptop and smartphone soon to (Need this for work so can't get rid of them before my work contract runs out)
> Sold most of before i moved so at this point im left with a flatscreen i need to sell
> Feels so good to not be in need of all these things
>
> Even sold my huge HiFi setup which i have bought over the last 3 years - This hurt my heart a little bit but i know its for the better in the end
>
> **Sunlight / CT:**
> Have to go to work at 8 in the morning so can manage to get about 20-30 mins of the first part of the sunrise
> Started getting really fast at eating my lunch so that i can go out in parking lot and get abit of sunlight into my eyes - This seems to help me sleep better even when its only about 15 min
> This is one of the biggest problems for me atm
> On the weekends i can be naked outside for some untill it gets to cold (atm it is between 3 - 10C) - usally about 20 mins at a time which i try to do as much as i can
> This also seems to help me cold-adapt slowly as i can stay outside in the cold longer and longer
>
> Still a little hesitant to jump into the lake that is pretty close to me - think it need to set up simple tube where i can control the water temp and cold-adapt further first
>
> **Music:**
> Allways listened to alot of music (Mostly Electronic, Drum & Bass and older rock like Led Zeppelin, Metallica etc.)
> Most of my favorite albums have started to sound so different - The music does not sounds as fractal anymore and i hear it more as a whole
> Thought this was pretty interesting as most the songs i have been listing to so many times over many years
>
> **Visiting @[Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) / Diet:**
> Toke a trip to Germany to visit Inger and what a lovely lady she is
> We discussed some biohacks and gathered our own Oysters - So a third of my fridge is now filled with Oysters
> Was really nice to meet another Mithocondriac and i learned alot too
>
> Also started eating fish everyday to try and mitigate my bad enviroment just a bit
>
> **nnEMF:**
> After alot of calls my power company i finally managed to make a deal that allows me to get rid of the smartmeter in my new living arrangment
> Will have to pay for the meter and electrian to change it and maybe a minor yearly fee
> This i can live with and should help alot with decrease the nnEMF
>
> Still have not gotten any meters but will order some soon now that i have a good amount of cash from selling most of my electronic
>
> **Labs:**
> As mentioned i got a new doctor and will go for my second consulation next week
> Last time he sounded pretty interested in my "project" but time will tell
>
> **Sleep:**
> Some nights i have started dreaming alot sometimes soo much that i wake up in middle of night and wonder if it was real lol
> The night when i got back from Germany i woke up 2 times as i had these very wired dreams which i can still remeber most of
> Has to be all the sun seafood etc. that i got on my trip
> Can't remeber the last time i could remeber my dreams !
>
> **Quantlet:**
> Bought a used Quantlet which i can't wait to try out
> Hope this will help me on the more cloudy days
>
> Overall i keep feeling a little better everyday
>
> Fell like my Journal needs some pictures as it's getting a little boring
> Soo here is a picture of my dinner with some german Oysters and mackrel shashimi
> [View attachment 5929](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/5929/)

Nice pic!  A perfect meal

I feel special about the members I meet at Jack kruses site.. it is as we are family somehow! It was so very nice to have you here   I have not laughed that much in quite some time...lol

I think remembering dreams is a great thing! I dream very clearly close to every single night... My dreams are like.. real. Crazy! But nice, because the dreams are often really nice  and sometimes very weird..lol

I would not worry about the peeing thing. When I drink a lot I do pee a lot, what to do
Just peeing in the middle of the night is not so good but for me it really helped to cut my breaker for the bedroom. I think it might have to do with nnEMF... Now I seldom pee in the night, and if, it is rather early in the morning.
I am curious if you see any change when you find out how to cut yor breaker, or when you get rid of the smart meter. I am pretty sure it will help

### SlamSlask — 2017-11-20T15:23:39+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-228484>

I have 3 bigger projects going on atm.
**CT:**
So far I have been only wearing shorts when I was outside and taken cold showers but will now start following the CT quick start guide
I have ordered some thermometers and a compression shirt so should have everything I need now
Will start this from Monday next week as my ordered should have been delivered by then
**Epi-Paleo:**

-   Found a little local business that has about 15 cows walking by a river where I can get really good grass-fed meat bones and fat
-   A few of the men around here often go hunting so here I have gotten some cheap wild meat to
-   Will start using more turmeric and pepper when cooking

-   I have also ordered some seaweed from Amazon

    I will soon be able to call my diet Epi-Paleo!

**Water:**
I have run out of San Pellegrino and would like to start drinking the water from a spring that is not too far from me
As I could not find any good and cheap bottles I decided that I will go to the German border and fill my car with San Pellegrino in glass bottles and afterward refill the bottles from the spring This will both be easier and cheaper than buying bottles here in Denmark

**Peeing at night:**
Had no trouble with this over the weekend so hopefully, it has stopped

**Beard:**
My beard has started growing much faster the last month have to shave about every 3 days whereas before I could wait for about a week
Not sure if this is due to some hormones getting better or just me getting a bit older

### SlamSlask — 2017-11-28T15:02:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-229004>

**Smart Meter:**Read about these things last night and I was pretty shocked at how bad they actually are
Microwave frequencies from all the sockets and the electricity also get much dirtier (Spikes)
No wonder I had much more trouble sleeping in my old apartment where there where 10 of this in my building all connected to the same power grid !!

The power company forgot to mention that the electrician needs a written permission from them in order to change the meter
Called the power company and asked them to do so but they never got back to the electrician even though they have agreed to let me change the meter

Will have a technician (from the power company) come and check it next week - He laughed at me when I told him that my smart meter was disturbing my sleep due to microwave signals
He mentioned on the phone that it is possible to turn off the "remote readings" and that he thought this will help with the microwave stuff I was talking about so hopefully he will be able to do this

But not sure if this will change the situation with the increase in dirty electricity they make
And then there of course still is the privacy concern if they can turn back on the reading remotely
Will have to buy some meters soon to test the dirty electricity
Should have known that this would not be that easy

**Work:**
Only 1 month till I'm off my current work
Will be able to get 90% of my current salary from my insurance in max 3 months so should have plenty of time to find a "Healthier" job
This is gonna decrease my nnEMF exposure by ton and allow me to get much more sunlight
My backup plan is to start studying Physics as my new rent is so low that I can live on the "Education support" you get here in Denmark
This can also be taken online so no need to sit in a classroom filled with WiFi and 20 other people using their laptops and smartphones

**A trip to Spain:**
Currently planning a longer trip to the northern part of Spain to get some more sun to help me "kick start" my health
This will be sometime in Q1 of next year

**CT:**
Got all thermometers and Under Armor shirt so I'm ready to start my CT practice
Hopefully, I will be able to use the lake pretty soon

**Quantlet:**
Have used the Quantlet for the last 3 days - mostly using the relax protocol while watching the last part of the sunset after work
Will give it some time and see how I fell doing it like this
Will try the performance protocol for my HIT program on the weekend (have scaled these down to only weekends as the sunset is coming too early on workdays)

A lot of the basic bio-hacks are starting to fall into place

### SlamSlask — 2017-11-29T20:51:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-229146>

**Everday I keep learning something new or connect some of the information I have learned
**

Today I talked with my mom and her sister to get a 30.000-foot view of the environment my grandmom and further down the chain had
Most obvious thing was my grandmother starting to get dementia about 55 - She was one of the few women with a work at the time
She worked at a local newspaper as an assistant so she was one of the first ones to work with computers etc.
Funny thing - the years where she started using the computer matched pretty well with the time they think she started to slowly have trouble remembering things
She was also a heavy smoker since they both could remember (This means she was about 25)
My grandmother died at age 68

The others further down the chain does not seem to have any major health issues and all lived long lives
Currently putting all this into my notes and will post the in-depth version later on

### SlamSlask — 2017-12-12T14:38:52+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/slamslask-journal-reversing-3-years-in-it.19368/post-230096>

@[Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) was so nice that she let me borrow her EMF meters

So been measuring my work environment today and it is worse than I thought
**Desk reading ESI 24:**

-   Max on HF waves all the time in the office (Checked the access points and they send out on both 2.4 & 5GHz and they transmit a lot of data)
-   Electric and magnetic going up depending on distance to devices - low at my sitting spot though

**Desk Readings Trifield:**

-   Magnetic-field goes up to max when close to docked laptop - But the field goes away fast when getting away from it
-   Wireless phone headset creates a huge magnetic and microwave field - The dock also pulses microwave out when the headset is disconnected about every 10 secs - Will make sure I dock the headset from now on
-   The desk phone itself creates a low magnetic field
-   My keyboard and mouse does not create any EMF - Changed these a few months back to the simplest wired pair I could I could find

Of course, there is the light issue to
There is a lot of fluorescent lights in the ceiling and each person has either 2 or 3 monitors
**Glad i only have 12 work days left**

Will measure my home more closely this evening
